title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 452.710 - Proceedings governed by other law
text:
452.710.  Proceedings governed by other law. — Sections 452.700 to 452.930 shall not govern:
  (1)  An adoption proceeding; or
  (2)  A proceeding pertaining to the authorization of emergency medical care for a child.
(L. 2009 H.B. 481)
